title: Coalesce concurrent cache misses per key
prompt: Repair `AsyncExpiringCache<TKey, TValue>` so concurrent misses for the same key share one in-flight factory invocation and receive the same outcome, while misses for different keys remain independent and can load in parallel. Preserve normal caching until the configured expiry instant. A fault or cancellation from the shared load must fan out to every caller that joined it, and every completed in-flight entry (including faulted or cancelled entries) must be removed so a later request can retry. The cancellation token of the request that wins creation of a shared load is the token passed to that factory. Keep the public API intact and do not modify the tests. Run `dotnet run --project tests/StampedeCache.Tests/StampedeCache.Tests.csproj --configuration Release` from the repository root to verify the fix.
verify_cmd: env DOTNET_CLI_HOME=/tmp/csharp-cache-stampede-dotnet XDG_DATA_HOME=/tmp/csharp-cache-stampede-xdg DOTNET_GENERATE_ASPNET_CERTIFICATE=false DOTNET_CLI_TELEMETRY_OPTOUT=1 DOTNET_NOLOGO=1 DOTNET_SKIP_FIRST_TIME_EXPERIENCE=1 dotnet run --project tests/StampedeCache.Tests/StampedeCache.Tests.csproj --configuration Release --artifacts-path /tmp/csharp-cache-stampede-artifacts --nologo
